Team it with a denim skirt for that uber cool and comfy look.Product DetailsTeal green round neck top, has short cap-sleeves, graphic print on the front with diamante embellishmentsMaterial and Care95% cotton and 5% lycraMachine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergentDo not tumble dry, bleach or soakLine dry inside out in shadeWarm iron only, do not iron directly on print/embroidery
